sections.a_eyebrow: Data Visualization · Charts · Professional · Data Intensive · Modern
sections.a_description: The distinctive visual language of Heatmap UI — combining data visualization, charts, professional elements to create interfaces that are immediately recognizable and purposefully designed. Every color, font choice, and spacing decision works together to evoke the specific mood and cultural context that defines this aesthetic, from the primary accent color to the carefully chosen typography.

This style finds its natural home across websites and applications that value data visualization and charts design principles. You'll see it on creative portfolios, brand microsites, specialized platforms, and digital experiences where the visual language itself communicates as powerfully as the content — proving that the right aesthetic choice can transform a standard layout into a memorable experience.

a_image_cover.alt: Heatmap UI style use case illustration
Heatmap UI style use case illustration
Heatmap UI style use case illustration

sections.a_description: The distinctive visual aesthetic of Heatmap UI — a design approach that creates unique, memorable interfaces. Background: dark (#0f172a). The .inner panel has a slightly lighter background with subtle border treatment and appropriate border-radius. Colors: #ef4444 as the primary accent for interactive elements and highlights. #e2e8f0 for headings, #94a3b8 for body text. The aesthetic captures the essence of heatmap ui through careful color choices, spacing, and visual weight. Set in Space Grotesk — chosen for its visual character that complements this design style. Heading at weight 600-700, 24-28px, line-height 1.2-1.3. Eyebrow at weight 500, 11px, uppercase, 2-3px letter-spacing, color #ef4444. Body at weight 400, 14-15px, line-height 1.6-1.7, color #94a3b8. Buttons: primary — #ef4444 background with contrasting text. Secondary: transparent with #ef4444 border. Alternatives: system-ui (universal fallback), sans-serif stack.
